prompt: Create a cinematic vertical fantasy portrait of a handsome young East Asian man, a mysterious noble warrior, standing in a crowded ancient Chinese night market street during light rain. He has pale skin, sharp refined features, a serious melancholic expression, and long flowing black hair tied half-up beneath an ornate dark metal crown with jagged black-gold points. He wears layered black hanfu-style robes with subtle embroidered patterns, leather wrist guards, a dark cloak, and a sheathed sword at his waist. He is holding exactly one cat in his arms: a white cat with black markings on the head, ears, back, and tail, alert golden eyes, and one paw extended over his sleeve. The man looks downward toward the cat, protective and introspective. Background: narrow old-town street with traditional wooden buildings on both sides, curved tiled rooftops, warm hanging paper lanterns, blurred pedestrians, wet reflective stone pavement, faint mist and smoke, deep blue night sky. Lighting should contrast warm orange lantern glow with cool moonlit blue shadows, creating dramatic rim light on hair, crown, robe folds, and the cat’s fur. Style: ultra-realistic cinematic historical fantasy, high-detail costume texture, shallow depth of field, atmospheric bokeh, moody romantic drama, vertical 9:16 composition, waist-up framing, centered subject. Avoid text, logos, modern objects, extra animals, distorted hands, or duplicate faces.
promptEn: Create a cinematic vertical fantasy portrait of a handsome young East Asian man, a mysterious noble warrior, standing in a crowded ancient Chinese night market street during light rain. He has pale skin, sharp refined features, a serious melancholic expression, and long flowing black hair tied half-up beneath an ornate dark metal crown with jagged black-gold points. He wears layered black hanfu-style robes with subtle embroidered patterns, leather wrist guards, a dark cloak, and a sheathed sword at his waist. He is holding exactly one cat in his arms: a white cat with black markings on the head, ears, back, and tail, alert golden eyes, and one paw extended over his sleeve. The man looks downward toward the cat, protective and introspective. Background: narrow old-town street with traditional wooden buildings on both sides, curved tiled rooftops, warm hanging paper lanterns, blurred pedestrians, wet reflective stone pavement, faint mist and smoke, deep blue night sky. Lighting should contrast warm orange lantern glow with cool moonlit blue shadows, creating dramatic rim light on hair, crown, robe folds, and the cat’s fur. promptZh: 创作一张电影级竖构图奇幻肖像，画面中是一位英俊的东亚年轻男子，一位神秘的贵族武士，正站在细雨中的古代中国夜市街道上。他皮肤白皙，五官精致凌厉，表情忧郁深沉，一头乌黑的长发半束，戴着一顶带有黑色与金色锯齿状装饰的华丽金属冠。他身着层叠的黑色汉服风格长袍，配有皮革护腕、深色斗篷，腰间佩戴着一把剑。他怀中抱着一只猫：这是一只白猫，头部、耳朵、背部和尾巴上有黑色斑纹，金色的眼睛充满警觉，一只爪子搭在他的袖子上。男子低头看向猫咪，神情充满保护欲且若有所思。背景：狭窄的古镇街道，两侧是传统的木质建筑，屋檐弯曲，悬挂着温暖的纸灯笼，背景中有模糊的行人，湿润的石板路映照着灯光，空气中弥漫着淡淡的雾气和烟火气，深蓝色的夜空。光影效果应形成对比：温暖的橙色灯笼光与清冷的月光蓝影交织，在头发、冠冕、长袍褶皱以及猫咪的毛发上勾勒出戏剧性的轮廓光。风格：超写实电影级历史奇幻，高细节服装纹理，浅景深，氛围感虚化，忧郁浪漫剧风格，9:16 竖构图，半身取景，主体居中。避免出现文字、Logo、现代物品、多余的动物、扭曲的手部或重复的面孔。
